development and surface improve
ments. The ore shipments to date
have netted 5000.


The recent strike wns made in the
third crosscut in the No. tunnel.
Three crosscuts run from this tunnel
have encountered the vein, showing a
width of 80 inches. or which a foot
was high grade ore, running 230
ounces In silver. The vein is we'll
defined and has been opened up for
over 80 feet in length. So far 215
sacks Of ore have been taken out
ready for shipments. A car shipment
of this grade Of ore will run over
$4,000. In the No 4 tunnel immedi-
ately above the same shoot was
found to be over 100 feet in length
and there is every prospect Of this
shoot carrying the values for an equal
II not longer distance.


c. M. Fassett and H. s. Stoolhre
have gone to the mine to make an
examination for Ohio people.


The directors WIN issue to the
shareholders a statement Of the finan-
cial condition and the superintend-
ent's report on the mine today.
